name: Rival IQ Social Analytics and Competitive Intelligence API
what_it_does: Rival IQ competitive social media analytics REST API for marketing teams and agencies to benchmark social performance against competitors, track industry trends, and automate competitive intelligence reporting. Enables AI agents to manage social competitive landscape monitoring for competitor tracking automation, handle engagement rate benchmarking and industry percentile scoring for performance comparison automation, access content analysis and top post identification for content strategy automation, retrieve hashtag analytics and performance tracking for hashtag intelligence automation, manage automated competitive reports and landscape analysis for reporting automation, handle TikTok competitive analytics for short-form video intelligence automation, access multi-platform benchmark comparison across Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube for cross-channel intelligence automation, retrieve audience growth and follower trend analysis for brand health monitoring automation, manage agency multi-client competitive landscape tracking for agency reporting automation, and integrate Rival IQ with Slack, Google Sheets, and BI platforms for end-to-end competitive intelligence workflow.
use_cases: Benchmarking social performance from competitive intelligence agents
Tracking competitor content from brand monitoring agents
Generating landscape reports from agency analytics agents
Analyzing engagement rates from social performance agents
not_for: Social publishing and scheduling (Rival IQ is analytics-only; use Later or Loomly for publishing)
Social customer care and inbox management (use Agorapulse or Sprout Social)
Real-time social listening with sentiment (use Brandwatch or Sprinklr for deep listening)
best_when: A marketing team or agency wanting AI agents to automate competitive social benchmarking, engagement rate analysis, top content identification, and landscape reporting across major social platforms through Rival IQ's competitive analytics platform.
avoid_when: COMPETITIVE DATA BASED ON PUBLIC PROFILES ONLY: Rival IQ competitive analysis uses publicly accessible social profile data; automated competitive intelligence cannot surface competitors' private metrics, paid promotion spend, or audience demographics; automated competitive reports must scope output to publicly observable engagement, follower growth, and posting frequency. DATA FRESHNESS CADENCE FOR AUTOMATED MONITORING: Rival IQ data collection frequency varies by plan and metric; some metrics update daily, others weekly; automated competitive alerting must align alert thresholds with Rival IQ data update cadence to avoid false alerts from data lag rather than actual competitor activity changes. COMPETITOR LANDSCAPE COMPANY SELECTION METHODOLOGY: Rival IQ competitive landscapes require manual selection of competitor profiles; automated competitive intelligence workflows cannot auto-discover relevant competitors without human curation of landscape; automated landscape reports assume human-verified competitor selection for accurate industry benchmarking.

auth.notes: Rival IQ uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Seattle, Washington HQ. Founded 2012 by Seth Bridges and John Geletka. Bootstrapped. Products: Social competitive analytics, industry benchmarks, competitive landscape reports, hashtag analytics, TikTok analytics. Platforms: Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest. GDPR. Serves 500+ brands and agencies. Competes with Iconosquare, Socialinsider, and Sprout Social for social competitive analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free 14-day trial; no permanent free tier
pricing.paid_tiers: Drive ($239/mo, 10 companies), Engage ($349/mo, 25 companies), Engage Pro ($559/mo, 50 companies); annual discount
pricing.notes: Seattle WA. Bootstrapped. Subscription by company slot count. 14-day trial. Annual discount available.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; historical data queries throttled; no webhooks — polling-based integration

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — POLLING REQUIRED FOR AUTOMATED MONITORING: Rival IQ provides no webhook/push notifications; automated competitive monitoring must implement polling schedules aligned with Rival IQ data update frequency; high-frequency polling wastes API quota without receiving newer data than Rival IQ collection cadence

COMPANY SLOT LIMIT ENFORCED AT LANDSCAPE LEVEL: Rival IQ plan limits the number of companies tracked per landscape; automated competitive tracking expansion must verify available company slots before adding new competitors; automated competitor addition beyond plan limit creates billing upgrade requirement blocking automated workflow expansion

ENGAGEMENT RATE CALCULATION METHODOLOGY DIFFERENCES: Rival IQ engagement rates are calculated as interactions/followers and may differ from platform-native engagement rate calculations; automated benchmarking reports comparing Rival IQ engagement rates to platform analytics creates methodology discrepancy confusion; document Rival IQ calculation methodology in automated report context

HISTORICAL DATA WINDOW BY SUBSCRIPTION PLAN: Rival IQ historical data availability varies by plan (Drive: 1 year, Engage: 2 years); automated trend analysis must verify historical depth for target date range before query; automated multi-year trend analysis on Drive plan returns partial results without clear truncation error

PLATFORM ALGORITHM CHANGES AFFECT BENCHMARK VALIDITY: Social platform algorithm changes (Instagram chronological vs algorithmic feed, Twitter timeline changes) affect engagement rate benchmarks over time; automated competitive reports comparing current benchmarks to pre-algorithm-change benchmarks creates invalid comparison; implement period-specific benchmark normalization in automated competitive reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social competitive analytics. GDPR. API key. US. Competitor social performance and public profile data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Competitive analytics. GDPR. API key. US. Social competitive performance data.
